class="KeyPoint-content"><h2 class="h3"> NZ’s most trusted power price comparison site. </h2><p>We’re a not-for-profit, <strong>backed by Consumer NZ</strong>. Our free, 100% independent comparisons are ranked by price, not promotions. </p>
<p>For over 25 years, we&#x27;ve helped New Zealanders save money on power. Compare power plans today and see what you could save. </p></div></div></div></div><div class="Block Block--ThreeStepsBlockRecord Block-bg--white Block-pt--medium Block-pb--medium"><div class="Container ThreeStepsBlock"><h2 class="h4 mb4">Compare 15 energy providers in just 3 minutes</h2><div class="ThreeStepsBlock-steps"><div class="ThreeStepsBlock-step"><div class="ThreeStepsBlock-step-number"><span>1</span></div><div><h4>Pop in your address</h4>
<p>Or upload a recent power bill</p></div></div><div class="ThreeStepsBlock-step"><div class="ThreeStepsBlock-step-number"><span>2</span></div><div><h4>Compare prices</h4>
<p>Choose the best plan for you</p></div></div><div class="ThreeStepsBlock-step"><div class="ThreeStepsBlock-step-number"><span>3</span></div><div><h4>Click switch<strong>!</strong></h4>
<p>Your new retailer will be in touch</p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="Block Block--PersonCarouselBlockRecord Block-bg--black Block-pt--medium Block-pb--medium"><div class="swiper PersonCarouselBlock"><div class="swiper-wrapper"><div class="swiper-slide"><div class="PersonCarouselBlock-slide Container"><div class="PersonCarouselBlock-text w-100 w-50-m"><div up to the last 24 months of your electricity consumption data (i.e. the amount of power you used). This information can help you understand your electricity usage habits and make informed decisions when choosing a power plan for your household.\\r\\n\\r\\nChoose to request either:\\r\\n\\r\\n- a summarised report - the consumption data recorded on each of your bills, or\\r\\n- a detailed report - the consumption data in its most detailed format\\r\\n\\r\\nThe amount of data provided will depend on the period you are requesting for, the type of meter, and how often the meter was read, e.g. if you have a smart meter, your data may include 15-minute interval readings. We recommend requesting a summarised report due to the volume of information you could receive in a detailed report.\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;consumptionDataEmail\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;bring.change@ecotricity.co.nz\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;consumptionDataPhone\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;0800 845 000\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;generalInformation\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;Ecotricity is New Zealand\u0026rsquo;s first and only Toitū climate positive certified and 100% renewable electricity provider. Climate positive certified means Ecotricity measures the carbon footprint of its entire value chain and reduces these emissions by setting and achieving science-aligned reduction targets. Ecotricity then offsets remaining emissions at 125% to go beyond neutrality, and contributes a further 75% of its carbon footprint by supporting local environmental and social projects.\\r\\n\\r\\nUnlike many other retailers, Ecotricity offers contracts with a 3-year energy price freeze.\\r\\n\\r\\nOffers buy back power from grid-tied solar PV systems.  \u0026quot;,\u0026quot;products\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;Electricity only.\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;billingOptions\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;* Monthly\\r\\n* Direct debit\\r\\n* Online payment\\r\\n\\r\\nBill types: \\r\\n\\r\\n* Paper\\r\\n* Email\\r\\n* Web\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;rewards\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;-\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;complaints\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;Complain to your retailer first. If your complaint isn't resolved, ask [Utilities Disputes](http://www.utilitiesdisputes.co.nz/) to consider your complaint.\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;greenInitiatives\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;Ecotricity only contracts with hydro, wind and solar generation and is New Zealand's only provider of Climate Positive Certified electricity.\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;advancedSwitch\u0026quot;:true,\u0026quot;advancedSwitchEmail\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;bring.change@ecotricity.co.nz\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;requiresSmartMeter\u0026quot;:false,\u0026quot;smartMeterInstaller\u0026quot;:false,\u0026quot;switchUrl\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;https://onboarding.ecotricity.co.nz/Form/Index/4/onboarding\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;supported\u0026quot;:true,\u0026quot;eaTraderCode\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;ECOT\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;additionalTraderCodes\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;slug\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;ecotricity\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;metaTitle\u0026quot;:null,\u0026quot;metaDescription\u0026quot;:null}\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"wrapper mt3 pb3 pb5-netbook\" data-reactroot=\"\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"wrapper-inner\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"retailer\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"retailer-sections\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"mb2 mb3-netbook\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv id=\"planDetails\" role=\"region\" aria-labelledby=\"planDetails\" class=\"accordion-panel richtext mb2\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"flex fd-column\"\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"retailer-section retailer-greenInitiatives pt2\"\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eEcotricity is New Zealand's only Climate Positive Certified electricity and matches its customers\u0026rsquo; electricity consumption with 100% renewable energy sources.\u0026nbsp;\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"2d:T404,\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eInstructions\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eRequest up to the last 24 months of your electricity consumption data (i.e. the amount of power you used). This information can help you understand your electricity usage habits and make informed decisions when choosing a power plan for your household.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eChoose to request either:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul\u003e\n  \u003cli\u003ea summarised report - the consumption data recorded on each of your bills, or\u003c/li\u003e\n  \u003cli\u003ea detailed report - the consumption data in its most detailed format\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eThe amount of data provided will depend on the period you are requesting for, the type of meter, and how often the meter was read, e.g. if you have a smart meter, your data may include 15-minute interval readings. We recommend requesting a summarised report due to the volume of information you could receive in a detailed report.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eEmail \u003c/strong\u003e\u003ca href=\"mailto:bring.change@ecotricity.co.nz\"\u003ebring.change@ecotricity.co.nz\u003c/a\u003e\u003cbr /\u003e\u003cstrong\u003ePhone \u003c/strong\u003e\u003ca href=\"url:0800845000\"\u003e0800 845 000\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/p\u003e2e:T901,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\u003cul\u003e\n\u003cli data-leveltext=\"●\" data-font=\"Noto Sans Symbols\" data-listid=\"4\" data-list-defn-props=\"{\u0026quot;335552541\u0026quot;:1,\u0026quot;335559685\u0026quot;:720,\u0026quot;335559991\u0026quot;:360,\u0026quot;469769226\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;Noto Sans Symbols\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;469769242\u0026quot;:[8226],\u0026quot;469777803\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;left\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;469777804\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;●\u0026quot;,\u0026quot;469777815\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;multilevel\u0026quot;}\" aria-setsize=\"-1\" data-aria-posinset=\"1\" data-aria-level=\"1\"\u003e\u003cspan data-contrast=\"auto\"\u003eAll Electric Kiwi customers receive a free hour of power during an elected off-peak period every day. This may save customers money, but it also increases the likelihood that the power that comes from renewable sources. \u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"LineBreakBlob BlobObject DragDrop SCXW90020967 BCX0\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"SCXW90020967 BCX0\"\u003e\u003cspan data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\"\u003ePlease note - this is only available to eligible customers with specific meter types within supported networks.\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr class=\"SCXW90020967 BCX0\" /\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan data-contrast=\"auto\" xml:lang=\"EN-GB\" lang=\"EN-GB\" class=\"TextRun EmptyTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"LineBreakBlob BlobObject DragDrop SCXW90020967 BCX0\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"SCXW90020967 BCX0\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr class=\"SCXW90020967 BCX0\" /\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan data-contrast=\"auto\" xml:lang=\"EN-GB\" lang=\"EN-GB\" class=\"TextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0\"\u003eAdditionally, Electric Kiwi provides a \u0026ldquo;Green Meter\u0026rdquo; tool to help \u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0\"\u003ecustomers\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0\"\u003e understand the predicted \u0026ldquo;greenness\u0026rdquo; of the grid at any given time. \u003c/tbody\u003e\n\u003c/table\u003e5b:T408,\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eInstructions\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eRequest up to the last 24 months of your electricity consumption data (i.e. the amount of power you used). This information can help you understand your electricity usage habits and make informed decisions when choosing a power plan for your household.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eChoose to request either:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul\u003e\n  \u003cli\u003ea summarised report - the consumption data recorded on each of your bills, or\u003c/li\u003e\n  \u003cli\u003ea detailed report - the consumption data in its most detailed format\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eThe amount of data provided will depend on the period you are requesting for, the type of meter, and how often the meter was read, e.g. if you have a smart meter, your data may include 15-minute interval readings. We recommend requesting a summarised report due to the volume of information you could receive in a detailed report.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eEmail \u003c/strong\u003e\u003ca href=\"mailto:data.requests@pulseenergy.co.nz\"\u003edata.requests@pulseenergy.co.nz\u003c/a\u003e\u003cbr /\u003e\u003cstrong\u003ePhone \u003c/strong\u003e\u003ca href=\"tel:0800785733\"\u003e0800 785 733\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/p\u003e5c:T45e,data:image/png;base64,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,":T463,\u003cp\u003eToast Electric is New Zealand’s only not-for-profit electricity retailer. It services all households in the Wellington Electricity, Electra, PowerCo (Wairarapa) and Orion New Zealand networks (Wellington, Porirua, Hutt Valley, Kapiti, Horowhenua, Wairarapa, Christchurch and central Canterbury).\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://sustaintrust.org.nz/\"\u003eSustainability Trust\u003c/a\u003e, a Wellington-based charitable trust that has been warming up New Zealand homes and fighting energy hardship for over 20 years, operates Toast Electric.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eAnyone can join Toast. Toast Electric’s community-benefit model means that 100% of their profits support those living with low income, through their Energy Wellbeing programme. Customers on low incomes can be referred by partner agencies to this programme, which provides lower electricity tariffs, winter discounts and advice and support from the company’s assessors and partners.\u0026nbsp;\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eAs a not-for-profit organisation, Toast Electric has a focus on community benefit, social equity and ensuring low-income households are not left behind
